mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iot_product(tenant_id, org_id, product_key, product_secret, name, cover_image_url, thumbnail_url, description, protocol_type, device_type, status, extra_json, is_delete, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{orgId}, #{productKey}, #{productSecret}, #{name}, #{coverImageUrl}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{description}, #{protocolType}, #{deviceType}, #{status}, NULL, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM iot_product WHERE product_key = #{productKey} AND is_delete = 0 LIMIT 1

sql.where:
AND is_delete = 0
AND product_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productKey}, '%')
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND status = #{status}

mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM iot_product
ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE iot_product SET name = #{name}, cover_image_url = #{coverImageUrl}, thumbnail_url = #{thumbnailUrl}, description = #{description}, protocol_type = #{protocolType}, device_type = #{deviceType}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE product_key = #{productKey} AND is_delete = 0
UPDATE iot_product SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE product_key = #{productKey} AND is_delete = 0
UPDATE iot_product SET is_delete = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE product_key = #{productKey} AND is_delete = 0
